wins_analysis: No wins today — zero orders were executed. Both pending limit orders were placed too far from the market price and never triggered during the session.
losses_analysis: No losses either, but the real failure is zero execution. RELIANCE entry at ₹1,325 was likely below the day's trading range in a strong uptrend (stock gapping up), and INFY SELL at ₹1,155 was counter-trend and also never reached. Only 2 setups found with low conviction (58% and 32%) indicates overly restrictive scanning or poor zone identification.
regime_impact: The strong uptrend regime (+4.3%) should have provided excellent BUY opportunities, but our system failed to capitalize. Setting limit orders below market in a gapping-up environment guarantees non-execution. The regime was ideal for momentum/breakout entries rather than pullback-to-demand-zone entries.

improvements.action: In trending_up regimes with Nifty >+2%, switch BUY entries from demand zone limit orders to breakout entries (e.g., entry = previous day high + 0.1%) or use market orders at open for high-conviction setups
improvements.reason: RELIANCE BUY at ₹1,325 never filled because strong uptrend days gap up and don't pull back to demand zones. Zero execution means zero opportunity to profit.

improvements.action: Eliminate SELL setups entirely when regime is trending_up with ADX ≥ 25 and Nifty change > +2%. Hard filter, no exceptions.
improvements.reason: INFY SELL at 32% probability was a wasted order slot. Counter-trend trades in strong uptrends have minimal edge and consumed capital/attention.

improvements.action: Expand scanning to include momentum/breakout patterns (e.g., stocks breaking 20-day highs with volume > 1.5x average) when only ≤3 demand zone setups are found in an uptrend regime
improvements.reason: Only 2 setups found across all 50 Nifty stocks in a perfect uptrend environment is too few. The system needs alternative pattern types for trending markets.

improvements.action: Set a maximum distance rule: limit order entry must be within 0.5% of current market price for same-day fills in trending regimes. If demand zone is >0.5% below CMP, skip it or use a higher entry near CMP.
improvements.reason: Entry prices set too far from where price actually trades in momentum days leads to chronic non-execution. Zero fills = zero alpha.

improvements.action: Require minimum AI probability of 55% for any order placement. Do not place orders with 32% probability under any regime.
improvements.reason: INFY SELL had only 32% probability — well below any reasonable threshold. This wastes margin and order capacity.

tomorrow_focus: Prioritize BUY setups using breakout or near-market entries on stocks showing relative strength, and ensure at least 3-5 actionable setups are generated to avoid another zero-execution day.

symbol_notes.RELIANCE.NS: Demand zone at ₹1,325 was too far below market in a strong uptrend — tomorrow look for breakout entry above ₹1,344 or near-market pullback within 0.3% of CMP instead.
symbol_notes.INFY.NS: Counter-trend SELL with 32% probability was correctly avoided by the market. Do not attempt SELL on INFY while Nifty regime is trending_up.
